title: During an international flight an aircraft detects a UFO over the skies of Amazonas [2013]
excerpt: JUN 19th, 2013. At 12:30 pm, in the vicinity of Manaus, Amazonas, the aircraft of flight AVA 0086, which traveled from São Paulo-SP to Bogotá, Colombia, reported having identified for three minutes through of its radar system the movement of an unidentified flying object at about 12 NM [Nautical Miles] of flight AVA 0086. text_preview: JUN 19th, 2013. At 12:30 pm, in the vicinity of Manaus, Amazonas, the aircraft of flight AVA 0086, which traveled from São Paulo-SP to Bogotá, Colombia, reported having identified for three minutes through of its radar system the movement of an unidentified flying object at about 12 NM [Nautical Miles] of flight AVA 0086. The observations on the report collected by the representative of COMDABRA [Brazilian Aerospace Defense Command] still provides the following information : “The aircraft reported to ACC-AZ that it spotted traffic on its radar at 1 o’clock and 2 o’clock positions at 12 NM [nau
summary: International flight AVA 0086 detected an unidentified radar contact for 3 minutes near Manaus en route from São Paulo to Bogotá.
